diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,213 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, InitApp type, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: exports from ../../helper/html, ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../client
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createFactory, createMiddleware, and CreateHandlersInterface for handler factory pattern
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: imports ../../context, '../../request/constants', '../../types', '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides utilities for matched routes and route path lookup from context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: imports ../../context, ../../types, ../../context, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides defineWebSocketHelper for creating WebSocket upgrade handlers
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: imports ../../context, ../../utils/cookie, ../../context, ../../utils/cookie, ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides cookie reading/writing/generation/set/deletion operations
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imports ../../client, '../../client/types', '../../context', '../../hono', '../../types', '../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient for client-side request testing
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: imports ../../context, ../../context, ../../utils/color
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment and provides env access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, rawCssString
+- Reads as: imports ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, '../../utils/html', './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts: isOldBunVersion
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides styled CSS class generation for server and client side rendering
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, toHash, normalizeLabel
+- Reads as: no dependencies in current file
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common utilities for CSS helper including class name generation, CSS building, and minification
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, HTTPException
+- Reads as: imports ../../http-exception, '../../utils/headers', '../../utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch API for request/response forwarding with header handling
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides route inspection and router name utilities
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw, stringBufferToString, escapeToBuffer, resolveCallbackSync
+- Reads as: imports ../../helper/html, '../../utils/html', '../../context', ../../hono, '../../types', '../../utils/stream'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides raw HTML escaping and string interpolation utilities
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile
+- Reads as: exports ./ssg, exports ./middleware, exports ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper provides static site generation utilities for Hono
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG
+- Reads as: imports ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, '../../utils/mime', './middleware', './plugins', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG core provides static site generation with route fetching and content saving
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: imports ../../context, ../../types, '../../types', './utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware provides SSG request generation, disabling, and context checking
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths, dirname
+- Reads as: imports ../../hono, '../../types', '../../utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utilities for path manipulation and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: exports ./stream, exports ./sse, exports ./text, exports ../../utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper provides streaming, SSE, and streaming text util
